name: Hearts of Palm Salad
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can, whole hearts of palm
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the hearts of palm and cut them into bite-size pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine the chopped green pepper, drained pimientos, celery, green onions, chopped parsley, vegetable oil, and lemon juice.
3. Add the hearts of palm to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight.
5. Serve the salad on lettuce leaves.
